message:
fix(config): route config unset to correct store (GH#2727)

Apply maphew PR #2749: bd config unset now routes yaml-only keys
(backup.*, routing.*, etc.) to config.yaml and beads.role to git config,
matching the routing already done by set/get. Adds UnsetYamlConfig()
that comments out the key to preserve it as documentation. Also adds
backup.* and dolt.shared-server to bd config list yaml display.

Closes #2727

Co-Authored-By: matt wilkie <maphew@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
